Usage: gaia pkg [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...

 Package operations (add / add-import / add-module / formalize / lock-check /
 migrate / mount / register / scaffold).

в•­в”Ђ Commands в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚ add         Install a registered or LKM-backed Gaia knowledge package.       в”‚
в”‚ add-import  Inject ``from <module> import <names>`` into a Gaia package      в”‚
в”‚             file.                                                            в”‚
в”‚ add-module  Scaffold a sibling Python module under ``src/<import_name>/``.   в”‚
в”‚ formalize   Upgrade scaffold queue items to formal warrants.                 в”‚
в”‚ lock-check  Run the spec В§5.3 publish gate against an embedded host.         в”‚
в”‚ migrate     Migrate a legacy Gaia package to the non-invasive embedded       в”‚
в”‚             layout.                                                          в”‚
в”‚ mount       Mount a Gaia knowledge package on top of any host directory.     в”‚
в”‚ register    Prepare or submit a registration for a tagged GitHub-backed Gaia в”‚
в”‚             package.                                                         в”‚
в”‚ scaffold    Scaffold a fresh Gaia knowledge package.                         в”‚
